detaileddescription.para: Total propensity of all the reactions in the system

briefdescription.para: Time at which next event will occur.

detaileddescription.para: State vector of reaction velocities. Only a subset are recalculated on each step.
Recalculates the time for the next event. Used when we have a clocked update of rates due to timed functions. In such cases the propensities may change invisibly, so we need to update time estimates
Cleans out all reac rates and recalculates atot. Needed whenever a mol conc changes, or if there is a roundoff error. Returns true if OK, returns false if it is in a stuck state and atot<=0
Builds the gssa system as needed.
Assign the volume, and handle the cascading effects by scaling all the dependent values of concInit and rates if applicable.

memberdef.argsstring: (const GssaSystem *g, unsigned int rindex, double time)
memberdef.name: updateDependentMathExpn

memberdef.argsstring: (const vector< RateTerm * > &rates, unsigned int numCoreRates, unsigned int index)
memberdef.name: updateRateTerms

detaileddescription.para: Update specified index on rate terms. The entire rates vector is passed in for the source values, the index specifies which entry on the local rate vector is to be updated.

memberdef.argsstring: (const GssaSystem *g, const double *s, vector< double > &v) const
memberdef.name: updateReacVelocities

detaileddescription.para: updateReacVelocities computes the velocity v of each reaction. This is a utility function for programs like SteadyState that need to analyze velocity.
Digests incoming data values for cross-compt reactions. Sums the changes in the values onto the specified pools.
